   +- PackageHeader[]
   +- ImportList[]
   +- TopLevelObject[]
   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- ClassDeclaration[@Identifier = "Foo", @TypeName = "Foo"]

   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Foo"]

   |  |        |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]

   +- EOF[@Text = "<EOF>"]
